w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: To gather all necessary information to design, develop, and launch the organization’s website.
Organization Address (physical location): 2925 Winterbourne Dr., Upper Marlboro, Maryland, 20774, USA
Countries of Operation: USA and Nigeria
Do you already have a brand identity? (✔)
If no, do you want the team to design a logo/brand kit? (✔)
Any websites you admire and would like your site to resemble? (Please list links)
Confirm preferred pages (tick all that apply): (✔)
History of the organization: SEE ATTACHED
Please list key initiatives you want featured:
Communities reached: Akure and its environs, Ile -
Any success stories or testimonials: T.B.D
Do you want a Blog/News section? (✔)
If yes, who will manage it?
If payment gateway, please specify preferred provider: _____
What email should receive messages from the website?
Do you want newsletter sign-up on the website? (✔)
Do you want social media icons displayed in the website footer? (✔)
Do you plan to share video content/testimonials on the website? (✔)
Do you already have a domain name? (e.g.,
No → Do you want the team to help purchase one? Yes
Do you want a Content Management System (CMS) to update the site yourself? (✔)
Who will manage website updates after launch?
Any additional features you want (e.g., events calendar, live streaming, donation tracker)? _________________
Please share the following if available:
High-quality images of programs TO BE UPLOADED LATER
Videos of outreach activities TO BE UPLOADED LATER
Any other requirements or expectations for the website? None for now
